name: Strawberry Cream Filled Crepes (Paulette Valo
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve 6 strawberries for garnish. Slice the remaining berries and set aside.
2. Whip the cream, icing sugar, and vanilla until stiff peaks form.
3. Fold in the sliced strawberries.
4. Spread each crepe with strawberry jam.
5. Spoon the filling down the center of each crepe, rolling them up.
6. Place 2 crepes on a plate, seam-side down.
7. Garnish with the reserved strawberries and sprinkle with icing sugar before serving.
Note: Raspberries, Blueberries, Peaches, Bananas, Kiwi fruit or a combination of these are also very tasty.
